rationale: Tests whether realized volatility breaking outside a historical probability cone signals the start of a momentum super-trend.
expected_failure_mode: Volatility breaking the cone could be a short-lived shock that reverts immediately, punishing leveraged entries.
stop_conditions: candidate family remains crowded or redundant
overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
The strategy buys the top of more than 10 major blow-off peaks.
Fails to accumulate shares during the slow low-volatility uptrend of 2017.
